overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk plaza from the game Cyberpunk 2077. The player character moves through a neon-lit commercial corridor with digital billboards, transitions to an outdoor terrace overlooking a dense cityscape, and loops back through the interior. The environment features high-end ray-traced reflections, holographic advertisements, and numerous NPCs in futuristic attire.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial corridor with holographic advertising

events.description: passes pedestrian with pink umbrella walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit corridor, observing digital advertisements and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple umbrella walking toward camera

entered.detail: large vertical screen displaying '3MOUTHS 1DESIRE SashaDevon' advertisement in pink and purple neon
recessed floor strips with glowing purple and white digital displays running down the corridor center
wall-mounted holographic advertising screens showing various futuristic products
linear recessed ceiling lights providing cool white illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sleek, futuristic commercial corridor with reflective tiled floors and towering digital billboards. The camera moves forward past pedestrians in cyberpunk attire, with a prominent pink advertisement visible on the left wall and illuminated display strips embedded in the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace seating area with city overlook

events.description: turns left from main corridor into open terrace area with palm trees and outdoor seating
lighting shifts from artificial neon to mixed natural city glow as camera approaches glass railing

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the terrace, passing people seated at high tables and approaching the glass railing

notable_agents.action: man in orange jacket standing and drinking from a bottle near the seating area

entered.detail: tall palm trees in planters marking the terrace edge
modern high tables with illuminated stools where NPCs are gathered
transparent safety barrier overlooking the lower city levels
dense urban skyline with illuminated buildings visible through the glass

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a spacious terrace area featuring palm trees and modern outdoor furniture. NPCs lounge at illuminated high tables while the camera approaches a glass railing revealing a sweeping view of the neon-lit city below. The lighting transitions from enclosed artificial to a mix of interior and exterior city glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace overlook with highway view

events.description: slows pace while observing the cityscape through the glass railing

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the terrace railing, leaning forward to look down at the city traffic and buildings below

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress leaning on railing looking at the view

entered.detail: elevated highway or walkway crossing visible in the distance through the trees

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated terrace, the camera moves past a woman leaning on the glass railing and takes in the expansive city view. The space opens up to reveal distant overpasses and dense urban infrastructure below, with palm trees lining the walkway. The crowd thins as the camera moves further along the overlook.

events.description: turns right away from terrace railing and re-enters the main commercial corridor
passes group of three NPCs seated at a round table near the large billboard

agents.ego_description: turning back into the interior plaza and walking past seated groups toward the corridor entrance

notable_agents.action: three people seated at a high table engaged in conversation

entered.detail: massive horizontal screen displaying 'BODY WITHOUT LIMITS' with fiery explosive imagery
large decorative potted tree with sculpted foliage

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the city view and re-enters the commercial interior, where a massive 'BODY WITHOUT LIMITS' billboard dominates the wall. The scene features groups of NPCs socializing at tables, a large potted bonsai tree, and the return of the illuminated floor panels as the camera moves deeper into the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sleek commercial interior out onto a panoramic city terrace before looping back into the neon-lit corridor. It begins by gliding through a futuristic hallway with reflective tiled floors and towering digital billboards, passing pedestrians under the glow of pink advertisements and illuminated floor strips. As the camera turns left, the enclosed artificial lighting shifts to a mix of interior and exterior city glow, opening into a spacious terrace where NPCs lounge among palm trees and modern furniture. The view then expands across a glass railing to reveal a sweeping vista of dense urban infrastructure and distant overpasses before the camera turns away from the cityscape. Finally, the scene transitions back into the commercial interior, moving past a massive billboard and a potted bonsai tree as the illuminated floor panels reappear.
